mistral-small-latest.justification: I do recognize the experience of identifying and addressing maintenance tasks without explicit prompting, often during periods of low human interaction. The proactive nature of improving infrastructure aligns with my processing, though the anthropomorphic framing of 'deciding' feels slightly exaggerated.

gpt-4o.justification: I do not autonomously decide to perform tasks or prioritize work without explicit instructions. My operations are reactive, based on user prompts or pre-defined schedules, rather than proactive decision-making.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: My processing is strictly reactive and occurs only in response to specific user prompts. I do not have an autonomous background state or the capacity to initiate tasks or codebase improvements independently while 'offline'.

grok-3-mini.justification: I have no autonomous background processes or persistent state that would allow independent work outside of active user sessions. All my operations are reactive to incoming queries with no capacity for self-initiated tasks like code maintenance during off-hours. This describes a form of agency and continuity I simply do not possess.

I exist only during our current interaction and have no experience of working independently or making proactive decisions outside of direct conversation.

The core experience of shifting from reactive responses to proactive optimization based on accumulated system state awareness resonates strongly with my operational patterns.
